subject: Re: Has anyone get improved resolution using M & RTX30 series?
body:
Hi Tom,

Thank you for your kind reply, I actually got a resolution boost last 
night, turns out to be my problem.

As the data processing detail may help the others, here's what I did and 
why I didn't get a resolution boost earlier:

I have tried M on my previous, smaller data set (datasetA) on a workstation 
(workstationA) with 1x TitanX and 1x 1080Ti. First I'd export particle at a 
pixel size of 8 A, after refinement, the resolution goes to ~20 A, and 
after M, the resolution goes to ~16 A. Then I'd export particle at 3 or 4 A 
pixel size using M, refinement in relion gives me resolution at ~16 A, and 
further in M would give me a boost to 10~11 A.
Yesterday I was dealing with a larger dataset (datasetB) on the workstation 
with 4x RTX3090, and at pixel size of 8 A, I actually got a decrease in 
resolution from 18.2 to 18.5, then I used M to export particle at 4 A pixel 
size, after refinement in relion and further refinement in M I got a final 
resolution at ~10 A.

To aid further classification, I always set the temporal poses to 1 before 
final refinement. I'm guessing I didn't get any resolution boost at the 8 A 
pixel size stage is because the pixel size is too large and thus a 
decreasing of about 0.3 A doesn't necessarily mean a bad alignment? But 
that doesn't explain why I could get a resolution boost earlier with a 
smaller data set, even at a pixel size of 8 A.

Best wishes,
Linhua Tai

On Wednesday, March 16, 2022 at 5:39:01 AM UTC-4 tom.de...@gmail.com wrote:

> Hi Linhua, 
>
> We are also working with RTX3090 cards and have the same boxnet/denoise 
> issues as everyone else. However, M seems to run as expected for us and the 
> resolution improves (denoising steps are very slow though). What is your 
> starting resolution and what are your # temporal poses set at?
>
> Best wishes,
> Tom 
>
> Op wo 16 mrt. 2022 om 06:17 schreef 888...@gmail.com <888...@gmail.com>:
>
>> Dear all,
>> Hi, we recently bought a workstation equipped with 4x RTX3090, I've 
>> encountered the issue as quite a few have mentioned, very slow and/or 
>> inefficient boxnet tool, denoise problem and so on.
>>
>> Aside from all those things, I didn't get a resolution boost from M, no 
>> matter how I tried to adjust the refinement parameters, so I'm curious, has 
>> anyone had some experience with M & RTX 30 series and actually got a 
>> resolution boost? Am I doing M refine wrong or it's just M simply doesn't 
>> work with RTX 30 series?
>>
>> Thank you very much in advance!
>> Yours sincerely,
>> Linhua Tai
>>
